name: Swing Loose Indoor Golf
address: 2000 Center Dr Suite A206, Hoffman Estates, IL 60192
about: Swing Loose Indoor Golf - Hoffman Estates is an indoor golf facility located in the Bell Works Chicagoland complex. It utilizes TrackMan iO technology in multiple bays to provide realistic golf simulation experiences with real-time swing analysis and ball flight data. The venue offers a relaxed atmosphere suitable for casual play, practice sessions, and group events, with a focus on accessibility through hourly bay rentals and membership options. Pricing is flexible, with hourly rates, monthly memberships starting at $99, and special offers for frequent players and building tenants.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time swing feedback and ball data from TrackMan iO technology
Ability to play on iconic virtual golf courses worldwide
Flexible booking options for groups up to 6 people per bay
Relaxed, fun atmosphere suitable for various occasions
Option to book adjacent bays for larger parties and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food service
BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own food and drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Combines radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging for accurate real-time data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them at the venue. Swing Loose also offers custom club fittings using TrackMan technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a BYOB policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks. They also have a full kitchen and bar available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies based on your pace and the course chosen, but typically takes 1.5-2 hours on average.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and accommodates up to 6 people per bay. They also offer kids golf clinics and host birthday parties.
